scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && start-server-and-test "npm run preview:test" http://127.0.0.1:4317 "playwright test tests/e2e/routes.spec.js tests/e2e/public-site.spec.js tests/e2e/style-audit.spec.js"
scripts.test:a11y: npm run build && start-server-and-test "npm run preview:test" http://127.0.0.1:4317 "playwright test tests/e2e/accessibility.spec.js"
scripts.test:links: npm run build && start-server-and-test "npm run preview:test" http://127.0.0.1:4317 "node tests/qa/check-links.mjs"
scripts.test:lighthouse: npm run build && start-server-and-test "npm run preview:test" http://127.0.0.1:4317 "lhci autorun --config=./lighthouserc.json"
scripts.qa:website: npm run lint && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:links && npm run test:lighthouse
